channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned Porsche on Long Street, 1st May
item.description:
Porsche Taycan has been left abandoned for approx 4 months at the intersection of Long and Waterson street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 number 168 shop (I thi, 1st May
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 number 168 shop (I think this is shut) side wall facing Perran Road graffiti tagged white painted and black painted wall. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perran Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish piled up in street., 1st May
item.description:
Rubbish and recycling piled up in street long before collections are due. This will now be left for nearly a week until recycling is collected. Also, why does two flats have 4 bins?. All constantly left on the pavement. Please notify occupants.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rushmore Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st May
item.description:
Previous pothole coming back after recent repair. Getting deeper every week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olyffe Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog from 9 cadet drive Constantly off lead and fouling, 1st May
item.description:
Dog from 9 cadet drive Constantly off lead and fouling
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bushwood Drive, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No clear signage to indicate parking in marked bays, 1st May
item.description:
Parking signage is not clear on Lyndon Avenue to indicate parking in marked bays. Multiple vehicles park outside of marked bays which cause an obstruction to other road users by blocking the road when they don't park in the bays. Emergency vehicles will not be able to pass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Lyndon Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Diagonally opposite 19 Throwley Close: pile of rubbish., 1st May
item.description:
Rubbish is on grass area diagonally opposite 19 Throwley Close.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Throwley Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropkey box was broken, 1st May
item.description:
Dropkey box of Torrens Court (1-12) was found to be broken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blanchedowne, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa paets dumped bloccking the enterance to my garage, 1st May
item.description:
Sofa parts have been fly tipped outside my garage by the resident of 313 lower road. On asking them not to block it I was told 'F*** off'

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croft Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Limebike Ravensbourne River, 1st May
item.description:
The bike is half on the bank and half in the river so couldn't get to it to get a number. It's by Millwall training ground end of the river.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Greenway, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked and broken paving slabs, 1st May
item.description:
The pavement is badly damaged and a hazard to all pedestrians but especially young children, the elderly or those who are partially sighted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groveland Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree, 1st May
item.description:
Dead tree outside number 38 kings hall Road. Replacement tree should be planted

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old chair and, 1st May
item.description:
.....now left on street has moved up and down the road between 301 - 271 broken kitchen chair
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lee High Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement outside 15 Austral Street, 1st May
item.description:
Rubbish on pavement outside 15 Austral Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Austral Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on back of road sign, 1st May
item.description:
This is a second example - the other has now been closed (thank you)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven kerb, 1st May
item.description:
Sunken kerb, uneven with early footpath damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Sparrow Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised pavements, 1st May
item.description:
There is a tree outside number 64 that I making the pavements raised and is a trip hazard. The tree has been reported before and nothing has been done about it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blithdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of bin bags not picked up, 1st May
item.description:
A pile of bin bagged were reported to be fly tipped but it looks like they have not all been taken. There is still a substantial pile of bin bags outside of churchward house.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Drawers & r Of Drawers & Old kitchen cupboard, 1st May
item.description:
These items have been dumped near to and opposite 12&13 Fordyce Road Renovation work being carried out next door to 12.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fordyce Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish bag, 1st May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish bag on top of the electrical exchange box
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
